findings.evidence: Resolved: when an admin requests a real class change without rowVersion, CorrectForAdminAsync loads the current AdminEnrollmentSummary and includes it under the same current field used by stale_enrollment and enrollment_conflict. AdminEnrollmentSummary maps RowVersion to base64 and exposes only enrollment/catalog fields.
findings.why_it_matters: The client cannot recover from this expected concurrency precondition using the response itself, and the same correction command exposes incompatible 409 shapes depending on how the version conflict is reached.
findings.required_action: Load the current admin enrollment summary and include it in the row_version_required 409 response, preserving its base64 rowVersion and the same current field shape used by stale_enrollment and enrollment_conflict.
